_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.IMPORTANT: Replace all placeholder values with your actual credentials before using this workflow
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_WEBHOOK_ID: Get from n8n > Your workflow > Webhook node > Copy the Webhook URL and extract the ID from it
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_DOCUMENT_ID: Get from your Google Sheet URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/{YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_DOCUMENT_ID}/edit - Copy the ID between /d/ and /edit
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_SPREADSHEET_NAME: The name of your Google Sheet tab (default is 'Sheet1' or your custom sheet name)
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_CREDENTIAL_ID: Get from n8n > Credentials > Google Sheets OAuth2 > Click on it and copy the ID from URL or use the connection in n8n
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL_ID: Get from n8n > Credentials > SMTP > Click on your SMTP credential and use the ID or reconfigure it in the nodes
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.your-email@example.com: Your actual email address that will send the emails
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.admin-email@example.com: Admin email address where lead notifications should be sent
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_INSTANCE_ID: Get from n8n > Settings > Instance ID or from export metadata
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_VERSION_ID: Unique workflow version - regenerated automatically by n8n on each save
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID: Unique workflow identifier - found in n8n workflow URL: /workflow/{YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID}
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.YOUR_BRAND_NAME: Your company or product name (appears in email templates)
_CREDENTIALS_AND_PLACEHOLDERS_GUIDE.NODE_IDs: System-generated unique identifiers for each node - auto-regenerated by n8n on import

parameters.subject: Thanks for contacting YOUR_BRAND_NAME 🚀
parameters.text:
=Hi {{$json["Name"]}},

Thank you for contacting us 🙌

We received your message:
"{{$json["Message"]}}"

We will get back to you soon.

— Team YOUR_BRAND_NAME

parameters.subject: =New Lead Received - YOUR_BRAND_NAME
